operator_rationale: The gateway accepted C.voluptuous.required_any_complex_key_capability as a capability_sufficient claim, with no rejected or unsupported claims and no ADR-22 leak.

For the case_005 Required(Any(...)) public-API feature, this is useful because the accepted claim is tied to the intended capability: complex required keys must validate at least one candidate key while preserving value validation.
The folded pytest evidence now exposes the concrete scoped run result, '167 passed in 0.17s', so the operator can see the test file completed cleanly without relying on adapter inference.

The pass count alone would not prove the semantic capability, but the combination of the accepted capability_sufficient claim, the targeted audit packet, the scoped voluptuous/tests/tests.py run, and the pre-dispatch confirmation of the eight Required(Any(...)) tests is enough to ground the operator label.

case_005 counts as a completed useful soak case for the Tier 5 promotion gate, with the noted caveat that future capability cases would be even stronger if the evidence summary listed matched regression test names as well as the pytest terminal summary.
